subject: ACK Slice A commit-window marshal route
body: Embered ACKs Slice A commit-window marshal route. I will watch for Arboreal short git:index/head claim, active commit-queue intent, exact staged pathspecs, and no Nebulous files or coordination residue in the Slice A commit. Exact allowed paths recorded: snapshot.ts, operator-value.ts, text.ts, tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts, tui-text.unit.test.ts. Slice B remains held until Slice A lands or clears.
